What We Do

Our Services

From residential retaining walls to full rural property earthworks — we handle it all with precision and pride.

01

Rock & Retaining Walls

Natural rock walls and engineered retaining solutions built to hold. Designed for both function and aesthetics.

02

Site Cuts & Excavation

Precise excavation and site preparation for new builds, sheds, and major earthworks projects.

03

Driveways & Drainage

Gravel, concrete, and compacted driveways. Stormwater and erosion control systems that actually work.

04

Rural Property Earthworks

Large-scale earthworks for rural properties — tracks, dams, land levelling, and property access.

05

Custom Retaining Solutions

Sleeper walls, concrete panels, rock walls — we match the method to your land and budget.

06

Erosion & Drainage Control

Expert drainage design to protect your property from water damage and soil loss long-term.

Why Foster

Why We're
Different

01

Local Knowledge, Local Pride

We know the Yarra Ranges soil, slopes, and conditions better than anyone. That local expertise means faster, smarter solutions.

02

100% Client Satisfaction

We don't leave until you're happy. Our reputation is built on repeat clients and word-of-mouth referrals — not just one-off jobs.

03

Transparent Pricing

No hidden costs, no surprises. You get a detailed quote before anything starts, and we stick to it.

04

Free Site Visit & Quote

We come to you. Our free site visits mean we quote accurately the first time — saving you time and stress.

05

Multiple Solutions, One Call

With a broad service range, we offer the right solution for your budget and site — not just what's easiest for us.

100% Client Satisfaction Guaranteed

Guaranteed Results

Every project is backed by our full satisfaction guarantee. Quality workmanship that stands the test of time in the Yarra Ranges environment.
